title: Little Zeus and the Giant Sneeze
tagline: Sometimes the biggest messes teach you the most important lessons.

hero.name: Little Zeus
hero.visual: Small boy with wild curly white hair, tiny golden crown, big bright blue eyes, white toga with gold trim

sidekick.name: Baby Hercules
sidekick.visual: Chubby toddler with enormous arms, tiny lion-skin cape, confused happy expression, always accidentally breaking things

mentor.name: Athena
mentor.visual: Girl with grey-streaked hair, tiny owl on shoulder, big glasses, holding a scroll, always three steps ahead

friend.name: Pegasus Junior
friend.visual: Very small white winged horse, fluffy feathers, big sparkly eyes, always sneezes glitter

voice_style.pacing: punchy — keeps kids engaged, quick on comedy beats
voice_style.character: fun storyteller reading a picture book, with real reactions

lesson: When you make a mess, own it and help fix it. Saying sorry is the first step.
youtube_title: Little Zeus and the Giant Sneeze! | Little Olympus | Kids Greek Mythology
youtube_description: Little Zeus has the BIGGEST sneeze in history and accidentally electrifies all of Mount Olympus! Can he fix the mess before the Sunshine Festival is ruined? A hilarious and heartwarming Little Olympus adventure for kids!

scenes.title: The Sunshine Festival Is Coming
scenes.narration: Once a year on Mount Olympus, everyone got together for the most important event of the whole year. The Sunshine Festival. There was sunshine pie. There was sunshine dancing. There was a sunshine parade with baby animals wearing tiny flower crowns. It was, without any doubt, the absolute best day of the year. And Little Zeus was going to ruin ALL of it with a sneeze.
scenes.visual_prompt: Little Olympus kids cartoon style. Mount Olympus decorated with colorful banners, flower garlands, and golden sunshine flags for the Sunshine Festival. Baby animals in flower crowns practicing for the parade. Everyone bustling with happy preparation. Little Zeus in the foreground holding a banner, smiling big. Bright festive morning colors. 16:9.

scenes.title: Something Tickles
scenes.narration: It started on the morning of the festival. Little Zeus woke up and noticed his nose felt... funny. Tingly. Like a tiny thunderbolt was building up right behind his nostrils. 'Uh oh,' said Little Zeus. He rubbed his nose. The tingle got bigger. He held his nose with both hands. The tingle laughed at him.
scenes.visual_prompt: Little Olympus kids cartoon style. Little Zeus's bedroom on Mount Olympus, morning light. Zeus sitting up in bed with both hands pressed to his nose, eyes squinting, face doing the pre-sneeze scrunch. Small lightning sparks crackling around his nostrils. His tiny golden crown askew from sleep. Very funny expression. 16:9.

scenes.title: Baby Hercules Is Not Helpful
scenes.narration: Baby Hercules came to check on him. 'You don't look good,' said Baby Hercules. 'I feel a sneeze coming,' said Zeus. 'A THUNDER sneeze.' Baby Hercules's eyes went very wide. Everyone on Mount Olympus knew about thunder sneezes. When little gods sneezed, sometimes their powers came out. And Zeus's power was lightning. Lots and lots of lightning.
scenes.visual_prompt: Little Olympus kids cartoon style. Baby Hercules standing in Zeus's doorway looking at Zeus with extremely wide eyes. Zeus pressing both hands over his nose and mouth, sparks flying anyway. Baby Hercules's enormous arms are held very stiff at his sides in frozen worry. The room is already slightly sparky. Morning light with crackle effects. 16:9.

scenes.title: The Sneeze Blockers
scenes.narration: They had to stop the sneeze before the festival. Baby Hercules brought pepper — that would definitely not help. Athena brought a small glass of water. 'Sip this,' she said. Zeus sipped. The tingle retreated... for three entire seconds. Then it came back twice as strong. The lightning sparks around his nose were now the size of grapes.
scenes.visual_prompt: Little Olympus kids cartoon style. Zeus sitting in a chair surrounded by failed sneeze remedies: a glass of water, Baby Hercules holding a pepper grinder (looking embarrassed), Athena's scroll with suggested remedies crossed out. Lightning sparks around Zeus's nose now visibly larger. Everyone looking worried. Chaotic funny problem-solving energy. 16:9.

scenes.title: The Pinched Nose Walk
scenes.narration: Zeus decided to pinch his nose shut and just walk through the whole festival without sneezing. It was a great plan. Athena gave it a 3% chance of working, which she helpfully announced out loud. Zeus pinched his nose and walked outside. He made it past the flower garlands. He made it past the pie stand. He made it almost to the parade. And then. AH.
scenes.visual_prompt: Little Olympus kids cartoon style. Little Zeus walking very stiffly through the Sunshine Festival with both fingers pinching his nose, eyes watering, face bright red from holding it in. Festival decorations all around him. Baby Hercules tiptoeing behind him nervously. Everyone at the festival staring. Zeus is making it through... barely. Lightning crackling around his head. Mounting comedy tension. 16:9.

scenes.title: AAAH-CHOOOOOO
scenes.narration: AH. AH. AAAAH-CHOOOOOO. The sneeze came out. It was the biggest sneeze in the history of Mount Olympus. Lightning shot in seventeen directions at once. The sunshine pie flew off the table. Three flower crowns went airborne. The parade banner wrapped around a tree. Pegasus Junior sneezed glitter in sympathy. And every single sunshine decoration on Mount Olympus turned bright electric blue.
scenes.visual_prompt: Little Olympus kids cartoon style. EPIC sneeze panel: Little Zeus mid-enormous-sneeze, lightning radiating out in all directions, shockwave rings expanding. Sunshine pie flying through the air. Flower crowns spinning off. Banner wrapped around a tree. Pegasus Junior sneezing glitter cloud. All the yellow festival decorations now glowing electric blue. Total cartoon chaos. 16:9.

scenes.title: Blue. Everything Is Blue.
scenes.narration: There was a long silence on Mount Olympus. Everyone looked around. The sunshine decorations were blue. The sunshine flags were blue. The sunshine pie had a blue crust. Even the baby animals' flower crowns had turned faintly blue. The festival was in forty-five minutes. And Little Zeus had just turned the Sunshine Festival... electric.
scenes.visual_prompt: Little Olympus kids cartoon style. Mount Olympus after the sneeze. Everything that was yellow is now glowing electric blue. Blue decorations, blue banners, slightly glowing blue baby animal flower crowns. Everyone standing still looking around at the blue chaos. Zeus in the middle, hand over his mouth, looking absolutely horrified at what he did. 16:9.

scenes.title: Zeus Hides Under a Cloud
scenes.narration: Little Zeus crawled under a cloud and stayed there. He pulled the cloud down over himself like a blanket. He could hear people outside being very confused about the blue pies. He felt terrible. Not sick-terrible. Worse than that. The kind of terrible where you know YOU did it and you can't pretend you didn't.
scenes.visual_prompt: Little Olympus kids cartoon style. A fluffy cloud on the ground with two tiny feet visible sticking out from under it. Zeus is hiding under the cloud like a blanket. His golden crown is slightly poking out the side. Around him the festival chaos continues — people carrying blue pies, looking at blue decorations in confusion. Funny but sad. 16:9.

scenes.title: The Cloud Gets Lifted
scenes.narration: Baby Hercules very gently lifted the cloud — or tried to. He accidentally launched it into the sky. So now Zeus was sitting on the ground with nowhere to hide. Athena sat down next to him. 'You know what you need to do,' she said. Zeus knew. He really really really did not want to. But he knew.
scenes.visual_prompt: Little Olympus kids cartoon style. Baby Hercules looking up guiltily as the cloud goes flying into the sky. Zeus now sitting exposed on the ground, knees pulled to chest, crown askew. Athena sitting cross-legged beside him, very calm, her owl nodding on her shoulder. Zeus looking at the ground. The blue festival chaos continues around them. 16:9.

scenes.title: Sorry Is a Hard Word
scenes.narration: Little Zeus stood up. He smoothed down his toga. He straightened his tiny golden crown. He walked to the center of the festival where everyone was standing around looking at the blue everything. And he said — in his smallest voice — 'I'm sorry. I sneezed. I turned everything blue. I'm really really sorry and I want to help fix it.'
scenes.visual_prompt: Little Olympus kids cartoon style. Little Zeus standing in the center of the Mount Olympus festival square, surrounded by confused people looking at blue decorations. Zeus's hands clasped in front of him, looking genuinely sorry, speaking to the crowd. His voice shown as a tiny speech bubble. Everyone looking at him. Very sincere small boy energy. 16:9.

scenes.title: What Happens When You Say Sorry
scenes.narration: There was a pause. Then Apollo started laughing. Not mean laughing — surprised laughing. 'The pies are BLUE!' he said. 'They still taste like sunshine pie.' Someone tasted a blue pie. It DID still taste like sunshine pie. Actually... maybe even better? The crowd looked at the blue decorations again. With the lightning in them, they were sort of... sparkly.
scenes.visual_prompt: Little Olympus kids cartoon style. Apollo laughing and holding a blue pie, taking a big bite. Other Olympus characters cautiously tasting blue festival foods and looking pleasantly surprised. The electric blue decorations are now noticed to be actually quite sparkly and beautiful in the sunshine. Mood shifting from confused to delighted. 16:9.

scenes.title: The Blue Festival Is Actually Amazing
scenes.narration: Hermes ran the parade route. The baby animals with their glowing blue flower crowns looked INCREDIBLE in the sunlight. Like tiny royalty. The electric blue banners lit up the whole mountain. Pegasus Junior flew overhead sneezing glitter against the blue background and it looked like fireworks. Someone said 'This is the BEST Sunshine Festival ever.' And they were not wrong.
scenes.visual_prompt: Little Olympus kids cartoon style. The Sunshine Festival now in full swing with the accidental blue theme. Baby animals in glowing electric blue flower crowns looking absolutely majestic. Blue-lit banners sparkling. Pegasus Junior overhead sneezing golden glitter against the blue, looking like fireworks. Everyone dancing and laughing. It is genuinely beautiful and festive. 16:9.

scenes.title: Zeus Has the Best Day
scenes.narration: Little Zeus ate four slices of blue sunshine pie. He danced in the parade. He sneezed twice more — very small sneezes, very controlled — and made two of the flowers sparkle blue on purpose. Everyone cheered. Baby Hercules joined the parade and accidentally knocked over a float but mostly caught it, which counted as helping.
scenes.visual_prompt: Little Olympus kids cartoon style. Little Zeus dancing happily in the parade, crown perfectly straight for once, surrounded by blue sparkle. He sneezes a small controlled sneeze making two flowers glow blue — crowd cheering. Baby Hercules in the parade behind him holding a float that is slightly but not completely knocked over, grinning. Full joy energy. 16:9.

scenes.title: What Athena Wrote in Her Scroll
scenes.narration: At the end of the festival, Athena showed Zeus what she had written in her scroll. It said: 'Today's lesson — When you make a mess, say sorry and help fix it. The mess might turn into something better than what you had before. But you have to say sorry first. That part is not optional.' Zeus read it twice. He folded it up and put it in his pocket.
scenes.visual_prompt: Little Olympus kids cartoon style. Athena showing her open scroll to Zeus at the end of the festival. Zeus reading it carefully in the blue-lit evening. The scroll has the lesson written in neat handwriting with a small drawing of a blue sunshine festival at the bottom. Zeus looking thoughtful and genuinely changed. Warm blue-gold evening light. 16:9.

scenes.title: Next Year's Festival
scenes.narration: The very next morning, the festival committee held a meeting. They voted unanimously to make BLUE the official color of the Sunshine Festival from now on. They renamed it the Sunshine AND Lightning Festival. They made Zeus the official Festival Sneeze Artist. He would sneeze the decorations blue on purpose every year. He practiced for six months. He was very good at it.
scenes.visual_prompt: Little Olympus kids cartoon style. Official festival committee of cartoon Greek gods sitting at a golden table voting with hands raised. A sign behind them reads SUNSHINE AND LIGHTNING FESTIVAL — OFFICIAL. Zeus at a separate small table with a sign saying OFFICIAL SNEEZE ARTIST. He is practicing a controlled sneeze in a jar. Baby Hercules watching proudly. Very funny official-bureaucracy comedy. 16:9.

scenes.title: The First Official Lightning Sneeze
scenes.narration: The following year, Little Zeus stood at the center of the festival square. Everyone gathered. The decorations were ready to be electrified. Baby Hercules was in the front row. Athena had her scroll out. Pegasus Junior had glitter on standby. Little Zeus inhaled. He felt the tingle. He aimed very carefully. And then... AAAH-CHOO.
scenes.visual_prompt: Little Olympus kids cartoon style. Little Zeus standing on a small stage at the festival center in official festival pose, everyone gathered watching. He aims a dramatic pre-sneeze pose like a conductor about to start an orchestra. Baby Hercules front row, arms up excited. Athena pencil ready. Pegasus Junior fluffing his glitter. Maximum anticipation energy. 16:9.

scenes.title: The Perfect Sneeze
scenes.narration: The lightning went EXACTLY where Zeus wanted it to go. Every decoration turned brilliant electric blue all at once. The crowd erupted. Pegasus Junior released the glitter. Baby Hercules cheered so hard he accidentally knocked down a banner — but caught it — which everyone agreed counted. It was the most beautiful Sunshine AND Lightning Festival that Mount Olympus had ever seen.
scenes.visual_prompt: Little Olympus kids cartoon style. Perfect triumphant moment: all Mount Olympus decorations turning brilliant electric blue simultaneously from Zeus's directed sneeze. Crowd cheering and throwing their hands up. Pegasus Junior releasing a golden glitter cloud overhead. Baby Hercules catching a banner while cheering. Zeus taking a proud bow. Festival at peak joy. 16:9.

scenes.title: Later That Night
scenes.narration: That night, sitting on the edge of a cloud watching the blue-lit mountain glow below, Baby Hercules said, 'You know what the best thing you did today was?' 'The perfect sneeze?' said Zeus. 'Nope,' said Baby Hercules. 'The sorry.' Zeus thought about that. His tiny golden crown glowed in the blue light. 'Yeah,' he said. 'That part was the hardest.'
scenes.visual_prompt: Little Olympus kids cartoon style. Little Zeus and Baby Hercules sitting together on the edge of a fluffy cloud, legs dangling, looking down at the glowing blue-lit Mount Olympus below. Night sky with stars. Zeus's crown reflecting blue light. Both of them quiet and content. A small warm intimate scene after a big fun day. 16:9.

scenes.title: The Hardest and the Most Important
scenes.narration: And here's the thing about saying sorry. It IS hard. It's actually one of the hardest things to do, especially when everyone is staring at you and the pies are blue and you really really want to just hide under a cloud forever. But it's also the most important thing. Because sorry opens up everything that comes after. Including, sometimes, a much better party.
scenes.visual_prompt: Little Olympus kids cartoon style. Warm direct storytelling moment. Zeus and Baby Hercules on their cloud against the starry sky, the glowing blue festival visible below. Zeus looking thoughtful and a little older than he started the episode. Baby Hercules nodding slowly with surprising wisdom. The stars above them twinkling. Cozy and reflective. 16:9.

scenes.title: The Blue Pie Recipe
scenes.narration: Oh, and the blue sunshine pie. After the festival, three different families asked for the recipe. Which was awkward because the recipe was just regular sunshine pie plus one Zeus sneeze. The head baker put it in the official cookbook anyway. Under the ingredient list it just said: one small lightning sneeze, aimed carefully. The cookbook was a bestseller.
scenes.visual_prompt: Little Olympus kids cartoon style. Official Mount Olympus cookbook shown with a blue pie on the cover. Open to the recipe page showing all normal ingredients then at the bottom: '1 small lightning sneeze (aim carefully).' Zeus signing copies of the cookbook looking very pleased with himself. Baby Hercules eating a slice of the blue pie. 16:9.

scenes.title: Pegasus Junior's Contribution
scenes.narration: And Pegasus Junior. Nobody asked Pegasus Junior to sneeze glitter. He just did it. He was very proud of himself. He sneezed on things for the rest of the week. He sneezed on the fountain. He sneezed on Apollo's lyre. He sneezed on the official festival committee. Nobody said thank you. He sneezed on them again.
scenes.visual_prompt: Little Olympus kids cartoon style. Pegasus Junior mid-sneeze making everything around him sparkle with golden glitter. First the fountain now gold and sparkly, then Apollo's lyre glittering, then the very serious-looking festival committee covered in glitter while trying to maintain dignity. Pegasus Junior looking incredibly pleased with himself each time. 16:9.

scenes.title: What Zeus Learned
scenes.narration: Little Zeus learned that messes happen — especially when you're a little god with a big sneeze. But the mess is never the worst part. The worst part is hiding under a cloud and not saying sorry. The best part? Saying sorry opens the door. And sometimes on the other side of that door is a blue sunshine pie and a better party than you planned.
scenes.visual_prompt: Little Olympus kids cartoon style. Warm closing sunset scene. Zeus walking on the mountain path, crown perfectly on for once, looking confident and content. Baby Hercules and Athena walking beside him. The mountain behind them still faintly glowing blue. A cozy golden evening after a big adventurous day. 16:9.

scenes.title: The Little Olympus Song
scenes.narration: Up on Mount Olympus, the kids are the best! Little Zeus has his crown and Baby Herc has the rest! Athena's got the scroll and Pegasus has wings! Little Olympus is the place where everybody brings their very best thing! Little Olympus! Little Olympus! The funniest place in the sky! Little Olympus! Little Olympus! Where even the pies are blue!
scenes.visual_prompt: Little Olympus kids cartoon style. Full cast title card shot. Little Zeus, Baby Hercules, Athena, and Pegasus Junior all posed together on fluffy blue-glowing clouds at colorful sunset. Each character in signature pose. Show logo appears. Blue and gold confetti and sparkles everywhere. Maximum fun outro energy. Kids show ending vibe. 16:9.

scenes.title: See You Next Time!
scenes.narration: That's all for today on Little Olympus! Subscribe so you don't miss the next adventure! Next time — someone is having a VERY bad hair day. And we're not talking about Zeus's curls. Subscribe and find out! Bye from Little Olympus! Don't forget to say sorry!
scenes.visual_prompt: Little Olympus kids cartoon style. End card screen. Little Zeus waving at camera with his signature crown askew. Baby Hercules beside him with enormous arm wave. Subscribe button animated and bouncing. Little Olympus logo prominent. Channel handle @littleolympusai visible. Blue and gold color scheme. Friendly and direct to camera. Kids YouTube end card. 16:9.
